shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- git ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- app/actions.ts app/page.tsx app/create-post-form.tsx lib/posts.ts tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short 2>/dev/null || true && rg -n "updateTag|revalidateTag|unstable_cache|tags" app lib tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null'
/bin/bash -lc 'rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && test ! -e tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && printf '"'build artifact removed\\n'"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
